title: 24 Pcs Sanding Sponge Set - 120 Grit Sanding Pads, Flexible Sandpaper Block Coarse and Fine, Foam Sanding Pads Washable and Reusable, Wet and Dry Sandpaper for Metal Wood Wall Polishing
features: Package Includes: 24 pieces of 120 grit sanding pads, Dimensions 10 x 7 x 0.5 cm. Grit sizes are clearly labelled on the back of the abrasive pads.

High-quality material: The front side of the sanding sheet is made of aluminium oxide for long-lasting abrasion resistance. The flocked material on the back is not only comfortable to hold, but can also be fixed on the tool.
Wet dry sandpaper: the polishing pads is suitable for quick deburring in the dry and precise polishing in the wet.

Wide Application: The sanding block is suitable for sanding and polishing a wide range of materials such as metal, wood, steel and stainless steel, suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professional workshops.
Excellent Fit: The sand pads have a thin design to fit curved, angled and irregular surfaces, providing a better fit than traditional sandpaper.
description: Product Description High-density sponge Sanding sponge good elasticity and flexibility for use on edges, corners and curved surfaces Wet and dry use Wet sandpaper supports wet and dry sanding, it can be used in wet and dry environments, effect is outstanding Good adhesion Can be used with oscillating tools, fast sanding without loosening, easy and fast sanding Sand particles are uniform Aluminium oxide material, uniform and full sand grains, not easy to fall, strong grinding force, easy grinding
